nasb.text: You shall say, ‘Thus says the Lord God, “A city shedding blood in her midst, so that her time will come, and that makes idols, contrary to her interest, for defilement!

esv.text: You shall say, Thus says the Lord God: A city that sheds blood in her midst, so that her time may come, and that makes idols to defile herself!

cnv.text: 你要說：‘主耶和華這樣說：這城中有流人血的事，它製造偶像，玷污自己，以致它受審判的時候來到。

ccb.text: 你要向她宣告主耶和华的话，说，‘唉，你这杀人流血、制造偶像玷污自己的城啊，你的末日到了。
